title: BetterGameplay
description: Play minecraft with better fps and mods
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5ae7d821cb237d9b103b1a1d3dccc4d891d8031.png)

# BetterGameplay. The Ultimate Visual & Adventure Experience

Dive into a completely transformed Minecraft experience that balances stunning visuals, deep exploration, engaging quality-of-life features, and top-tier performance. **BetterGameplay** is designed to refresh your love for the game without straying too far from the core survival challenge.

### ✨ Key Features:

#### 🗺️ Epic Exploration & Content
* **Nether Overhauled:** Face the dangers of the expanded **Incendium** dimension and **Cinderscapes**, featuring new biomes, structures, and challenges.
* **Dungeons & Structures:** Explore vastly improved vanilla structures with **YUNG's Better** series (Mineshafts, Strongholds, Dungeons, etc.), making every discovery a unique adventure.
* **True Endgame:** Challenge the formidable **Ender Dragon Overhaul** for a truly epic final boss fight.
* **Waystones:** Easy fast-travel to make exploration less of a chore.

#### 🎨 Immersive Visuals & Animations
* **Fresh Animations:** Experience the world with entirely new, fluid animations for mobs, making the world feel alive.
* **Dynamic Shaders:** Full support for **Iris Shaders** with curated packs like **Complementary Reimagined** and **Complementary Unbound**, offering unparalleled visual fidelity.
* **Full 3D Assets:** Enjoy enhanced 3D models for crops, tools, held items, and even the Mace, adding depth to every item.
* **Atmosphere:** Enhance your experience with beautiful effects like **Falling Leaves**, **Cave Dust**, **AmbientSounds**, and **Drip Sounds**.

#### 🛠️ Quality of Life & Survival
* **Simple Storage:** Use **Tom's Simple Storage Mod** to organize and manage your extensive inventory with ease.
* **Inventory Management:** Essential tools like **Clumps**, **Mouse Tweaks**, **Durability Tooltip**, and **Shulker Box Tooltip** streamline your gameplay.
* **Mapping:** Never get lost again with both **Xaero's Minimap** and **Xaero's World Map**.
* **Better Controls:** Enjoy superior third-person perspective with **Shoulder Surfing Reloaded** and natural camera movement from **Camera Overhaul**.

#### ⚡ Performance & Stability
Built on the industry-leading Fabric foundation, the pack utilizes **Sodium, Lithium, Krypton,** and **FerriteCore** along with numerous other optimizers to ensure a smooth, high-FPS experience even with demanding visual settings.

**Get ready to explore Minecraft... *reimagined*.**
